title: Whaleborne - Yeet Cannonry! Addon
description: As if blocks weren't enough... Cannon ammunition expands its repertoire... Players!
body:
# Whaleborne: Yeet Cannonry! 🚀

You've tamed the whale. You've sailed the seas. There's only one frontier left: climbing into its cannon, because *you're* the ammunition now.

**Yeet Cannonry** turns Whaleborne's cannon into the most questionable ride in Minecraft.

- 🧍 **One of you becomes the cannonball.** Hop into the barrel and wait. Your head pokes cheerfully out the muzzle. This is fine.
- 🎯 **The other one takes aim.** Grab the gunner's seat, line up the horizon, and try not to laugh.
- 🙋 **Or go it alone.** No gunner around? Climb in, light it yourself, and become a cautionary tale entirely of your own making.
- 💥 **Gunpowder in. Charge up. Let go.** The ocean has never been crossed so fast — or so involuntarily.
- 👀 **Loaded and locked in.** While a gunner aims, your first-person view snaps to wherever the cannon is pointing. Enjoy the preview of your imminent regret. (Third-person stays free, if you'd rather not watch.)
- 💾 **Loyal to a fault.** Was too scared to handle the launch that you logged off? Not to worry! Log back in and you'll still be right there, ready to be launched  — even if the whale has sailed clear across the sea without you.

Bring a friend. Bring trust issues. Leave with both slightly damaged. (Or bring no one, and leave with neither.)

> ⚠️ **Requires [Whaleborne](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/whaleborne).** No whale, no yeet.

**Available for** Forge 1.20.1 & NeoForge 1.21.1.

*Concept by FloofHips · Add-on by Nacolla · MIT licensed.*
